,NGCCRM_RAE_ADJ_HDR_EDW_DTLS.PROFILE_ID
,NGCCRM_RAE_ADJ_HDR_EDW_DTLS.BATCH_ID AS SOURCE_BATCH_ID
                 
FROM 
(
 SELECT * FROM $$NRTACCUMVWDB.RAO_NGCCRM_RAE_ADJ_HDR_EDW_DTL
 WHERE SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME > '$$LastExtractDate'
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY ADJUSTMENT_ID, GLOBAL_NAME ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1
 AND 
 GLOBAL_NAME IN ('CG'))NGCCRM_RAE_ADJ_HDR_EDW_DTLS
WHERE
NGCCRM_RAE_ADJ_HDR_EDW_DTLS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
